title: Official FiskHeroes Server
description: A modpack for Fisk's Superheroes that includes some QoL mods
body:
# Official Fisk's Superheroes Server Modpack

IP: **heroes.fiskmods.com**

Step into the world of heroes and villains with the official modpack for our Fisk's Superheroes server. This pack includes a handful of quality-of-life mods to keep gameplay smooth and simple, so you can have fun and make friends with other players on our server with custom features and systems.

## Server Features

*   🦸‍♂️ **HeroPacks** – Craft suits from a diverse selection of HeroPacks, each with unique powers and abilities, allowing you to become the hero or villain you want to be.
*   📜 **Daily & Weekly Quests** – Take on challenges every day and week to earn unique and valuable rewards.
*   💬 **Player Driven Economy** – No server shop or fixed prices. Players trade directly with each other, setting their own value on every item.
*   ⚔️ **Fight Club** – Face off in duels against other players in a PvP arena. A leaderboard tracks the top players by total kills.
*   🎯 **Item Bounties** – Place item-based bounties on players. Anyone can claim the reward by taking down the target—watch your back!
*   👥 **Teams System** – Create or join teams with friends. Upgrade your team to increase its member limit and the number of sethomes you can have.
*   🛠 **Builder's Wand** – Craft up to 3 tiers of builder's wands, each with increased block placement range and durability for faster building.
*   🤖 **Auto Crafter** – Automatically craft items as needed to save time and stay organized.
*   🧱 **Custom Decorations** – Purchase and use unique decorative items to personalize your base from the admin shop at spawn.

Whether you're here to roleplay, compete, build, or grind quests, you can express yourself however you want!
